basic_details.job_title: RAUO Varanasi Yoga Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Regional Ayurvedic and Unani Office Varanasi (RAUO Varanasi)
basic_details.short_information: Regional Ayurvedic and Unani Office Varanasi (RAUO Varanasi) Yoga Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 04 May 2026 on the official website chandauli.nic.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RAUO Varanasi Yoga Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 21 to 65 years who have B.N.Y.S., B.A./B.Sc. (Yoga), M.Sc./M.A. (Yoga), PG Diploma in Yoga, Yoga Wellness Instructor certificate, or Intermediate (10+2) with relevant Yoga experience are eligible to apply for these Yoga Assistant vacancies. The offline application process for RAUO Varanasi Yoga Assistant R

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: B.N.Y.S. (5 years preferred), B.A./B.Sc. (Yoga) + 1 year experience, M.Sc./M.A. (Yoga) + 1 year experience, Post Graduate Diploma in Yoga (1 year) + 2 years experience, Yoga Wellness Instructor certificate + 1 year experience, Intermediate (10+2) + 2 years experience in Yoga Centre/Naturopathy Centre/AYUSH hospital
qualification.details: Yoga Assistant: Preferred: 5-year B.N.Y.S. degree. OR B.A./B.Sc. (Yoga) 3-year +1 year exp. OR M.Sc./M.A. (Yoga)+1 year exp. OR 1-year PG Diploma Yoga +2 years exp. OR Yoga Wellness Instructor cert +1 year exp. Alternative: Intermediate (10+2) +2 years exp in Yoga/Naturopathy Centre.

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications Personal interview Character & certificate verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RAUO Varanasi Yoga Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: chandauli.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Yoga Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Yoga Assistant post is 23rd May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Yoga Assistant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 10,000/-.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 65 years for all posts in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Yoga Assistant post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Yoga Assistant role?
faq.answer: The qualification includes options like a 5-year B.N.Y.S. degree, B.A./B.Sc. (Yoga) with experience, M.Sc./M.A. (Yoga) with experience, or Intermediate with relevant experience in a Yoga/Naturopathy Centre.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Yoga Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications, followed by a personal interview, and character & certificate verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Yoga Assistant post is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Yoga Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the Yoga Assistant post announced in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Office of the Regional Ayurvedic and Unani Office Varanasi (RAUO Varanasi).

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Yoga Assistant position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Yoga Assistant position is on a contract basis.
